message:
feat: Add Q-Healing system for quantization error correction

Implement Q-Healing (Quantization Healing via Sleep), a novel architecture
to run 30B+ parameter models on 16GB M2 MacBooks by combining aggressive
Q2_K quantization with precision-restoring LoRA adapters trained during
sleep cycles.

Key components:
- mixed_precision.zig: Per-layer quantization configuration with 6 quant
  types (Q2_K through F16) and automatic profile generation
- layer_repair.zig: Disk-paging layer loader and gradient accumulator for
  memory-efficient repair operations (~400MB per layer)
- q_healing.zig: Main controller with layer selection strategies (round
  robin, highest error, attention first, adaptive)
- hippocampus.zig: Added deep_sleep state for layer-by-layer healing
- profile.zig: Added q_healing_enabled and reference_model_path fields

Architecture:
- Runtime: Q2_K skeleton (12-13GB) + Q8 healing LoRA (50MB)
- Deep Sleep: Load single FP16 layer from disk, compute correction
  gradients, apply to LoRA adapter
- Expected result: Q2 model performing like Q4 after healing cycles
